detectors.description:
Reentrancy in ConfidentialUSDC.requestUnwrap(uint256) (src/ConfidentialUSDC.sol#189-230):
	External calls:
	- amountHandle = Nox.toEuint256(amount) (src/ConfidentialUSDC.sol#195)
	- balance = Nox.toEuint256(0) (src/ConfidentialUSDC.sol#199)
	- (success,newBalance,newSupply) = Nox.burn(balance,amountHandle,_totalSupply) (src/ConfidentialUSDC.sol#208)
	- Nox.allowThis(newBalance) (src/ConfidentialUSDC.sol#211)
	- Nox.allow(newBalance,msg.sender) (src/ConfidentialUSDC.sol#212)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _totalSupply = newSupply (src/ConfidentialUSDC.sol#214)
	ConfidentialUSDC._totalSupply (src/ConfidentialUSDC.sol#72) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- ConfidentialUSDC.confidentialTotalSupply() (src/ConfidentialUSDC.sol#126-128)
	- ConfidentialUSDC.constructor(IERC20,string,string) (src/ConfidentialUSDC.sol#93-104)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in Market.placeBet(uint8,externalEuint256,bytes) (src/Market.sol#212-277):
	External calls:
	- betAmount = Nox.fromExternal(encryptedAmount,inputProof) (src/Market.sol#235)
	- Nox.allowTransient(betAmount,confidentialUSDC) (src/Market.sol#242)
	- IConfidentialUSDC(confidentialUSDC).confidentialTransferFrom(msg.sender,address(this),betAmount) (src/Market.sol#248)
	- newYesBatch = Nox.add(_yesPoolBatch,betAmount) (src/Market.sol#255)
	- Nox.allowThis(newYesBatch) (src/Market.sol#257)
	- newNoBatch = Nox.add(_noPoolBatch,betAmount) (src/Market.sol#260)
	- Nox.allowThis(newNoBatch) (src/Market.sol#262)
	- Nox.allowThis(betAmount) (src/Market.sol#268)
	- Nox.allow(betAmount,msg.sender) (src/Market.sol#269)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- ++ pendingBatchBetCount (src/Market.sol#273)
	- ++ totalBetCount (src/Market.sol#272)
